mnemonics: BIG HDL: Verilog Is Great for Hardware Description Language
keyPoints: Verilog uses a module keyword to define a circuit block with inputs and outputs.
The assign keyword is used for continuous assignment of combinational logic.
Wire data types are used to connect components within a module.
commonMistakes: Using the wrong assignment type (blocking vs. non-blocking) for sequential logic.
Forgetting to list all inputs and outputs in the module port list.
Mixing up the direction (input/output) of ports in the module declaration.
